expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: heatmap highlighting effect scenarios cover activation, persistence, and reset behavior
expectations.evidence: result.md includes scenarios for activation (e.g., "Activate highlight on tap of a single heatmap cell"), persistence (e.g., "Highlight persistence while interacting with the page (no reset on scroll)", "after device rotation", "after background/foreground app cycle"), and reset (e.g., "Reset highlight by tapping outside", "tapping the same cell again", "selecting a different cell", "on data refresh / re-render", "navigating away and back"). execution_notes.md also states: "Case focus explicitly covered: Heatmap highlighting scenarios include activation, persistence, and reset behavior."

expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase phase4a
expectations.evidence: result.md is titled "Phase 4a — Subcategory-only QA draft (advisory)" and is subcategory-first with atomic action chains and observable verification leaves. execution_notes.md confirms alignment: "Output is subcategory-first and avoids forbidden canonical top-layer groupings (per phase4a contract). Scenarios include atomic action chains with observable verification leaves."
